breaking.title: Ex-intelligence chief Sallay ‘directed’ 2019 Easter bombings, says Sri Lanka Minister
breaking.summary: Minister Ananda Wijepala said Major General Suresh Sallay, who was arrested in February on accusations of “aiding and abetting” the attack, had identified a Catholic church to be bombed

breaking.title: Philippine town seeks immediate airlift of food to ease hunger in quake-hit villages
breaking.summary: Sarangani reported 20 dead from the quake, the highest toll from the affected provinces, mostly due to a landslide that buried houses in the coastal town of Glan

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Kuwait reopens airspace after temporary suspension following Iranian attacks
breaking.summary: Iran says Strait of Hormuz fully closed but U.S. denies it; Kuwait and Bahrain face fresh aerial attacks

breaking.title: Two Indian seafarers dead, one missing after U.S. attack on ship off Oman, says sailors’ union
breaking.summary: India condemns attack, summons U.S. Embassy’s Deputy Chief of Mission Jason Meeks to lodge a “strong protest”

breaking.title: Watch: Iranian missiles strike near US Fifth Fleet HQ in Bahrain
Gold prices dip Rs 1,600/10 gm, silver crashes Rs 5,000/kg after rising oil prices amid West Asia tensions. Time to sell?
breaking.summary: Gold and silver prices opened lower on MCX Thursday. Fresh Middle East tensions and rising oil prices impacted sentiment. US attacks on Iran contributed to the decline. MCX silver futures for July 2026 delivery fell significantly. Gold futures for August 2026 delivery also slipped. Soaring inflation amid the West Asia crisis is another concern.

breaking.title: Dwarikesh Sugar, Dhampur Sugar and other sugar stocks gain up to 4% after excise duty cut on ethanol-blended petrol
breaking.summary: Sugar stocks rose sharply on Thursday after the Finance Ministry exempted several ethanol-blended petrol variants from excise duty, strengthening the outlook for India's ethanol blending programme. Investors cheered the move as it is expected to boost ethanol demand, improve earnings visibility for sugar companies, and support long-term sector growth.

breaking.title: SpaceX IPO: Know date, price, valuation, how to buy and other important details
breaking.summary: SpaceX is preparing for a massive IPO. The rocket and satellite company plans to raise $75 billion at a $1.75 trillion valuation. Shares are expected to begin trading on Nasdaq on June 12. Investor demand is reportedly very high. Indian investors may need to use international platforms to buy shares after listing.
